title: New Optimization Guardian skill is live
summary: Update your linux-admin plugin to get /linux-admin:optimization-guardian-expert, a mandatory guardrail for optimization and tuning requests that requires baseline evidence, bottleneck proof, rollback, validation metrics, and monitoring before performance changes.
highlights: The diagnose router now routes optimization, tuning, sysctl, kernel/network/database/web tuning, limits, workers, queues, buffers, and capacity changes through the guardian first.
Plugin package metadata is aligned to 1.17.33 with 111 expert skills.
